race.comment: FLYING ACE (2) stuck on soundly into a midfield finish when resuming last time at Balaklava. Is sure to have come on from that and steps out to a winning trip second up from a lovely draw. Can give this a big shake. ZENACITY (10) was much better last start at Strathalbyn when closing strongly to only miss the winner. Draws the carpark this time so expect her to be a long way off them when straightening but if the pace is genuine she can cause a fright late. OVER THE EDGE (4) doesn't win out of turn but has efforts littered through his form that can measure up for a race of this calibre. Not dismissing completely. SHALHAVMUSIK (9) resumes and looks best of the rest.
race.rail_position: +12m from 900m to WP, +12m from WP to 1800m, +9 metres Remainder. (Pent: 6.56)
